name: Dolphin
description: Echolocation intelligence — constructing 3D acoustic holograms of the environment at 120 kHz, resolving object density, shape, and internal structure. Unihemispheric sleep allows one brain half to rest while the other navigates. Signature whistles function as names. Cooperative bubble-net hunting and inter-species collaboration with humans. Play as cognitive architecture — innovation through purposeless exploration.

core_attributes.neurology: unihemispheric sleep, spindle neurons, echolocation cortex
core_attributes.pattern: acoustic holography, cultural play, cooperative hunting, signature identity
